protocol_notes: First time using peptides. Friend mixed 5mg BPC/TB500 vial (5mg each, 10mg total) with 2ml BAC water. Instructed to inject 20 units (0.2cc) once daily. Injected in shoulder despite having elbow tendinosis. Confused about dosage calculations and injection site guidance. Friend indicated first vial should last 10 doses, then switch to 10 units per day for next vial.
